sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  wrapper:
    "w-full min-h-screen px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-10 2xl:px-20 py-6 sm:py-8 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-slate-200",

  container:
    "max-w-7xl mx-auto",

  header:
    "flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-4 mb-6 sm:mb-8",

  title:
    "text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold text-slate-800",

  card:
    "bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-lg border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl shadow-xl",

  formWrapper:
    "p-4 sm:p-6 flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 sm:gap-4",

  input:
    "w-full bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm sm:text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition",

  button:
    "flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm sm:text-base font-medium transition shadow-md",

  tableWrapper:
    "mt-6 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl",

  tableHeader:
    "hidden md:flex bg-slate-100 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500 px-6 py-4",

  rowDesktop:
    "hidden md:flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-t border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition",

  rowMobile:
    "flex flex-col md:hidden gap-3 px-4 py-4 border-t border-slate-200",

  emptyState:
    "p-8 sm:p-12 text-center text-slate-400 text-sm sm:text-base",
};
